summary: Iteration 5: Backend + Frontend validation of the 4 new sub-features (HS code per line item, AI Refine/Regenerate in editor, direct PDF row-download, Integrations settings). Backend pytest 5/5 pass. Frontend playwright verified HS code UI + persistence, Refine UI present, PDF row-download link appears and downloads a valid PDF, Integrations settings persist + secrets sanitized.

test_details.backend_pytest: 5/5 passed (test_iter5_features.py) — HS code persistence on document, AI draft returns hs_code field per line item (verified non-empty for coffee), PDF direct download via /api/files/{id}/raw returns valid %PDF- content, Integrations email settings persist (provider=resend, from) with email_api_key sanitized to has_email_key=true and NEVER leaked, PUT /settings requires auth, re-saving without resending key preserves existing key.
frontend_playwright: New Quote: filled line-item-0 + line-hs-0='240210'; after Save Document and re-open Edit, HS value persisted (verified '240210')
Refine UI: refine-input + refine-btn (Regenerate) visible in editor
Generate PDF: clicked generate-{id}; row-download-{id} link appeared within ~1s with href=/api/files/{pdf_file_id}/raw; direct GET returns valid %PDF- (size 2490 bytes)

Settings Integrations: email-provider=resend, email-from='quotes@testexecdist.com' persist after save+reload; email-key input clears (placeholder shows 'leave blank to keep current'); GET /api/settings returns has_email_key=true and does NOT include email_api_key or ai_own_key
test_details.ai_calls_used: 2 AI calls total (1 draft in pytest, minimal usage as requested; UI regenerate not clicked to conserve credits — endpoint already validated via backend test)

critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/settings returns the raw stored document (including ai_own_key and email_api_key) in the response body without sanitizing. GET /settings sanitizes them, but the PUT response echo does not. Frontend currently ignores the PUT response, so no user-visible leak — but any consumer of the PUT response would receive raw secrets. Recommend sanitizing PUT response the same way as GET.
server.py at ~1046 lines is approaching the 700-line guideline; consider modularizing (settings, documents, files, ai) into routers.
seed_data_creation: Test documents (TEST_*) created and cleaned up. Settings restored to email_provider=none, empty from, empty key after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 iteration-5 features working end-to-end. Only minor code-review note: PUT /api/settings response echoes raw secrets (GET is fine). Backend regression test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter5_features.py — reuse as-is.
